summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Neo Circular Ledger enhancement features. All major new features are working correctly including date filters, CSV exports, AI recommendations, Impact Report, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Share button shows clipboard permission errors in browser console
ui_bugs.note: Expected behavior in test environment due to browser security restrictions

passed_tests: Ward user login (ramesh@ward.in / ward123)
AI Waste Mix Recommendation card displays on Ward dashboard
AI recommendation shows 'Maximize Credits' and 'Maximize Earnings' advice
Ward ledger has FROM/TO date filter inputs
Ward ledger Export CSV button functionality
Date filtering works with clear functionality on Ward ledger
Impact Report page accessible via sidebar navigation
Impact Report shows all environmental metrics (Total Waste, Carbon Credits, Total Earnings, Entries)
Impact Report shows 'What Your Impact Means' with tree equivalence and cars off road calculations
Impact Report has Print Report and Share buttons
Impact Report shows Contribution Breakdown and Payment Summary sections
Plant Operator ledger has date filters and Export CSV (ops@greengas.in / plant123)
Admin All Transactions has date filters and Export CSV (admin@neo.in / admin123)
Admin transaction type filters (All, Waste Supply, Processing, Investments)
Mobile responsive: sidebar hidden on mobile (375px viewport)
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu visible and functional
Mobile responsive: login page works correctly on mobile
Sidebar shows Impact Report nav item for ward role
All CSV export buttons trigger downloads with success messages
Date range filtering works across all ledger pages
